commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c7e488e725b61f25d91944d7460cfa053bca38ad)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a gateway channel-reload cancellation flag, wires it into SIGUSR1 handling, checks it around deferred channel restarts, exports it through the CLI lifecycle runtime, and adds regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +55, Tests +106. Total +161 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main has a deferred channel reload path that waits and then stop/starts channels independently of SIGUSR1 restart, and the linked issue includes a concrete EADDRINUSE log timeline. I did not run a live Telegram gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose the lifecycle fix shape among competing candidate PRs and require stronger real behavior proof; this external branch is not a safe automated repair lane right now.

target.title: fix(gateway): cancel deferred channel reload when restart becomes pending
target.author: liuwqgit

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
